description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: Aligned Delegates must safeguard the security of the Sky Protocol through the Executive Vote process. To deal with emergencies related to Executive Votes, ADs are required to sign up for the approved emergency contact mechanism specified in [A.1.8.1.3.2.2 - Approved Emergency Contact Mechanisms](57006d4e-cd91-4565-97b5-5fab73fa94d5).

ADs must strictly adhere to all onboarding procedures and usage instructions associated with this emergency contact mechanism. ADs that fail to do so will be considered in misalignment and will be derecognized.
description: Extra spaces have been removed. --- The following have been kept unchanged: - Code blocks/lines have been kept unchanged excepting the removal of: - Line-final spaces - Interlinear spaces - Table layouts excepting the removal of: - Line-final spaces Newlines have not been changed.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling

diff: Aligned Delegates must safeguard the security of the Sky Protocol through the Executive Vote process. To deal with emergencies related to Executive Votes, ADs are required to sign up for the approved emergency contact mechanism specified in [A.1.

ADs must strictly adhere to all onboarding procedures and usage instructions associated with this emergency contact mechanism. ADs that fail to do so will be considered in misalignment and will be derecognized.
